
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__BSD_StucklistenPositionAlt](
	[Nr] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) primary key,
	[Position] [nvarchar](50) NULL,
	[ParentArtikelNr] [int] NOT NULL,
	[ArtikelNr] [int] NULL DEFAULT ((0)),
	[ArtikelNummer] [nvarchar](250) NULL,
	[ArtikelBezeichnung] [nvarchar](200) NULL,
	[Anzahl] [numeric](18,3) NULL DEFAULT ((1)),
	[upsize_ts] [timestamp] NULL,
	[OriginalStucklistenNr] INT NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTime] DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE(),
	[LastUpdateUserId] [int],
	DocumentId int NULL
) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
